description: website-builder plugin hooks — SessionStart detects entry mode + surfaces project state (and re-injects the current phase's orchestration block on resume); PreToolUse gates anti-skip violations against the current phase's exit criteria; PostToolUse (Write|Edit|MultiEdit) is the orchestration spine's phase-advance trigger — on a current_phase change it injects the phase-entry block via hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext (foundation/DESIGN-orchestration-spine.md). Handlers in Python at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks-handlers/ per decision 59 + foundation/DESIGN-architecture.md.
